# `RasterIRQ`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128  
**Parameters:** `p,b,n`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

Sets up the raster irq to trigger a user-defined interrupt (procedure) at a given raster line. Example: <br>
<code>
RasterIRQ(myRaster(), 25, 1); // Assign myRaster with kernel (1) to fire at rasterline 25
..
procedure myRaster();
begin
	 startirq(1); // start IRQ with kernal=1
	 ...
	closeirq();
end(); 
</code>


</div>
